reviews.review_description: I did not expect much from Puttzzle at first, but I was pleasantly surprised how easy and fun it was. It was easy and cute so my nephews liked it, but I enjoyed playing it as well. For how simple the premise is, the control was intuitive, which was great. I recommend it!

developer_response.body: Thank you for giving Puttzzle a shot! We love hearing that it brought joy to both you and your nephews—that’s exactly the kind of magic we hoped to create. Simple, fun, and a little addictive! ⛳🎉

reviews.review_description: A charming and engaging puzzle game where simplicity meets brain-teasing fun!

developer_response.body: Your review made our day—Puttzzle is all about blending charm with brain-teasing fun.

reviews.review_title: What a cute and simple game
reviews.review_description: It's a fun and challenging game with simple controls. Each level offers creative puzzles, and as you progress, the difficulty ramps up just enough to keep things interesting. It’s a great mix of relaxation and strategy!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! We're so happy to hear you're enjoying the mix of fun, challenge, and relaxation. Your support means the world to us!

reviews.review_description: Serious golf game is boring and then, I found this cute & neat puzzling putting game. So satisfying and no motion sickness at all! I was looking for something like this.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your wonderful review! We're so happy to hear that our game provided the satisfying experience you were looking for. Your feedback means a lot to us!

reviews.review_description: Charming and surprisingly addictive! The simple yet clever puzzles make every level a satisfying challenge.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review! We're so glad you're enjoying the puzzles and gameplay. Your support means a lot!

reviews.review_description:
For $3, this is shockingly addictive lol. It seems kinda dumb the first few holes but once I started figuring out the physics, the game turned into a blast.  If this were $20, I might not give it 5 stars… the game doesn’t really offer any extras that I’ve seen. It’s a bare bones experience: line your shot up, lock it in, and swing. That’s the game. What the game DOES offer is addictive gameplay. A few glitches here and there but nothing game breaking.

I suggest if you’re on the fence with this one,  just go ahead and spend the $3 today because I have a feeling it’ll increase to around $10 at some point… as long as the developer keeps developing the game that is (fingers crossed)

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review! We're thrilled you're enjoying the game! 🙌 We're keeping it simple and fun, with more updates on the way. Stay tuned and keep swinging! ⛳️

reviews.review_description: One of the rare positive surprises! I was expecting a small minigolf game, but it's really something unique. The most important thing first: it's really a lot of fun. The graphics are good, the controls are very well done, the physics are spot on, and the gameplay is excellent. Definitely worth grabbing for this little price. 5 stars!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the fantastic review! We’re thrilled our game surprised you and brought you so much fun!

reviews.review_description: Super simple game but the gameplay progression is fun enough to keep you going. Nice casual game for casual puzzle game players (like me).

developer_response.body: Glad you're enjoying it! Simple, but it’s all about that satisfying gameplay. Thanks for playing! 🎮
